name: go-api
description: Go HTTP API project with standard library

files.content:
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"log"
	"net/http"

	"{module}/internal/handler"
)

func main() {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	handler.RegisterRoutes(mux)

	addr := ":{port}"
	fmt.Printf("Server starting on %s\n", addr)
	log.Fatal(http.ListenAndServe(addr, mux))
}

# Build stage
FROM golang:1.22-alpine AS builder

WORKDIR /app

COPY go.mod go.sum* ./
RUN go mod download

COPY . .

RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o server ./cmd/server

# Final stage
FROM alpine:3.19

RUN apk --no-cache add ca-certificates tzdata

WORKDIR /app

COPY --from=builder /app/server .

EXPOSE {port}

ENTRYPOINT ["./server"]

version: "3.9"

services:
  app:
    build: .
    ports:
      - "{port}:{port}"
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      - DB_HOST=db
      - DB_PORT=5432
      - DB_USER=postgres
      - DB_PASSWORD=postgres
      - DB_NAME=appdb

  db:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: postgres
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres
      POSTGRES_DB: appdb
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"
    volumes:
      - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5

volumes:
  pgdata:

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

echo "Running unit tests..."
go test ./unit_tests/... -v

echo ""
echo "Running API integration tests..."
go test ./API_tests/... -v

echo ""
echo "All tests passed."

# {module}

A production-ready Go HTTP API built with the standard library.

## Tech Stack

- **Go 1.22** — leveraging the enhanced `net/http` routing (method patterns)
- **PostgreSQL 16** — via Docker Compose
- **Docker** — multi-stage build for minimal production images

## Quick Start (Docker)

```bash
docker compose up --build
```

The API will be available at `http://<HOST>:{port}`.

## Manual Setup

```bash
# Install dependencies
go mod download

# Run the server
go run ./cmd/server
```

## API Endpoints

| Method | Path         | Description          |
|--------|--------------|----------------------|
| GET    | /health      | Health check         |
| GET    | /api/users   | List all users       |

## Running Tests

```bash
# Run all tests
bash run_tests.sh

# Or run individually
go test ./unit_tests/... -v
go test ./API_tests/... -v
```

## Project Structure

```
.
├── cmd/server/          # Application entrypoint
├── internal/
│   ├── handler/         # HTTP handlers and routes
│   ├── model/           # Data models
│   └── service/         # Business logic
├── unit_tests/          # Unit tests
├── API_tests/           # Integration / API tests
├── Dockerfile           # Multi-stage Docker build
├── docker-compose.yml   # Docker Compose orchestration
└── run_tests.sh         # Test runner script
```
